title: Roasted Earthy Italian Baby New Potatoes Risotto
description: A delicious and earthy Italian-inspired solo-dinner featuring baby new potatoes and kombu-cold-extract, making it dairy-free-friendly. Perfect for a cozy evening in.
instructions: Peel the baby new potatoes and chop them into 1-inch pieces.
Place the chopped potatoes in a bowl and drizzle with olive oil, then sprinkle with salt and black pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Spread the potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until tender and lightly browned.
Meanwhile, heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the white wine and vegetable broth to the saucepan, stirring to deglaze the bottom. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until reduced slightly.
Add the cold-extract kombu to the saucepan and stir to combine. Cook for 2 minutes, or until the kombu has dissolved.
Add the roasted potatoes to the saucepan and stir to combine with the kombu-infused broth. Cook for 2 minutes, or until the potatoes are coated in the flavorful broth.
Stir in the nutritional yeast and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the risotto hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a sprinkle of thyme.
